title: With AI, researchers discover new way to detect sudden cardiac death risk
abstract: With AI, researchers discover new way to detect sudden cardiac death risk transforms static documents into an interactive Q&A system. It supports PDFs, websites, and codebases, with full source att...
abstract_zh: 用AI，研究人员发现了一种检测突发心脏死亡风险的新方法，简直把枯燥的静态文件变成了互动问答系统！PDF、网站和代码库通通搞定，就像给你的文档插上了会说话的翅膀！
